arts.ttl: Konate cover, Colwill offer, Zubimendi saga - Liverpool January transfer priority decided
arts.athr: liverpool.news@trinitymirror.com (Matthew Abbott, Josh Holland, Tom Coley, James Quinlan, Kieran Horn)
arts.sum: Arne Slot has now had plenty of time to assess his Liverpool squad heading into the January transfer window

arts.ttl: 'Unfortunately for them' - Arne Slot explains difficulty for Liverpool forward targets
arts.sum: Liverpool attacking options have become a strength this season and Arne Slot won't mind if it hampers individual aims

arts.ttl: Why Arne Slot's rampaging Reds are not yet as good as Jurgen Klopp's all-conquering Liverpool
arts.sum: Arne Slot's Liverpool are clear at the top of the Premier League and Champions League and the Reds head coach is cashing in on one vital element

arts.ttl: How to watch Newcastle United vs Liverpool, TV channel, streaming details and kick-off time
arts.sum: Even if they were in form, Newcastle will have to be at their very best to get something from this game, but after beating Arsenal, Chelsea and Spurs on home turf already this season, and taking a deserved point from Manchester City, there will be an inner confidence in the United camp. So it is this week when Premier League leaders Liverpool head to St James' Park tonight to face a Magpies side who followed up a home defeat to West Ham with an uninspiring 1-1 draw at Crystal Palace last weekend.

arts.ttl: What TV channel is Newcastle vs Liverpool on? How to watch Premier League match for free
arts.sum: One of six Premier League matches on Wednesday evening sees Newcastle welcome Liverpool to St James' Park, which will be televised but not on Sky Sports or TNT Sports

arts.ttl: £400m Newcastle worry clear but Magpies can cling to one thing vs Liverpool
arts.sum: Welcome to the comeback match for Newcastle United having lost last time out at St James Park, once a Tyneside fortress. For every upset a dozen match-ups go according to expectation and United haven't the best of records when accepting a home challenge against Liverpool.

arts.ttl: What Trent Alexander-Arnold sang to Anthony Gordon speaks volumes as Liverpool transfer call vindicated
arts.sum: Anthony Gordon almost became a Liverpool player in the summer with his transfer from Newcastle United lined up - is his failed move a blessing in disguise?

arts.ttl: Liverpool could be without six players vs Newcastle after new Federico Chiesa injury update
arts.sum: Liverpool are set to be without a number of players through injury when they travel to Newcastle United on Wednesday night

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: PSG chief gives Mo Salah verdict as Gary Neville claim mocked
arts.sum: Liverpool travel up to Newcastle after going nine points clear at the top of the Premier League table and Arne Slot's men know they must keep momentum going over a difficult Christmas period to remain top of the pile

arts.ttl: What happened after Man City win shows why Arne Slot knows new Liverpool danger
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot has issued a warning to his players ahead of Premier League showdown at Newcastle United
